creator: systems@xyops.com
text:
Attached is a shar file for mysql-workbench-5.2.40.  It has been several years since mysql-workbench has been up to date for FreeBSD.  This new port (databases/mysql-workbench) is intended to supersede mysql-workbench51 and mysql-workbench52.

A few notes:
- It works with MySQL 5.5
- It won't compile without manually applying a patch to pyport.h which is part of they lang/python* ports.  Python includes a workaround for an old FreeBSD problem which is no longer needed, and in fact causes compilation problems for other ports.  See http://bugs.python.org/issue15362 for more information and to download the patch.  If you're using a version of python other than 2.7, the patch might not work, but you can manually edit pyport.h very easily.
- It will compile with clang, but only if you patch boost-libs.  See https://svn.boost.org/trac/boost/ticket/6198 for more information.  This is fixed in newer versions of boost.

Please review.  However, I don't think we should commit this until there's a proper solution to the pyport.h problem.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
